evals.expected_output: A KB article about SDD created with zotero% citekey, core concepts, page references, and links to related notes.
expectations: The note slug contains 'darwiche' and 'sdd'
The note has a citekey starting with zotero%
The article body defines SDD (Sentential Decision Diagram)
The article references vtrees
The article includes page references like (p. N)
The note was written to the vault
Related existing notes were found via semantic search
Wikilinks were added to reference related existing notes
